data_source: SearXNG local + Reuters + CNBC + CNN + AP News + PBS + TIME + Guardian

risks.event: US-Iran CEASEFIRE + Trump Strike Threat (April 8, 2026): Trump announces ceasefire with Iran AFTER 39 days of war. Says Iran 'agreed to reopen Hormuz.' However, Trump ALSO warns US will strike Iran with 'GREAT FORCE' in next 2-3 weeks if terms violated. Ceasefire details unclear - Iran parliament formalizing Hormuz toll collection. Israel continues operations. 13+ US service members killed during conflict.
risks.region: Middle East / Iran, Iraq, Gulf States, USA
key_facts: Trump announces Iran CEASEFIRE - 39 days after war began (Feb 28)
Iran 'agreed to reopen Hormuz Strait' as part of deal
WARNING: Trump threatens 'GREAT FORCE' strike within 2-3 weeks
Iran parliament formalizing toll collection on Hormuz vessels
Israel continues separate operations against Iran
13+ US service members killed during 39-day conflict
Ceasefire terms still unclear - major verification risk
risks.trend: CEASEFIRE ANNOUNCED but 2-3 week strike threat looms - HIGH INSTABILITY

risks.event: Russia-Ukraine War — Ceasefire Momentum (April 8): Zelensky welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, says Ukraine ready to 'respond accordingly.' US envoys Witkoff & Kushner visiting Kyiv to reboot peace talks. Geneva negotiations remained 'on pause.' Russia planning new offensive while world focused on Middle East. Putin rejected Orthodox Easter ceasefire. Western support uncertainty as Iran conflict ends.
key_facts: Zelensky welcomes Iran ceasefire - Ukraine ready to respond
US envoys Witkoff & Kushner to visit Kyiv - peace talks reboot
Geneva negotiations still 'on pause' with Russia
Russia planning new offensive exploiting distraction
Putin rejected Orthodox Easter ceasefire
Iran conflict ending may shift Western support to Ukraine
~1M Russian casualties, 250K-300K Ukrainian casualties
risks.trend: Opportunity window - US envoys deploying, Iran distraction ending

risks.event: NATO Alliance Strain — Post-Iran Ceasefire (April 8): With Iran conflict ending, attention returns to NATO dispute. Trump previously threatened US withdrawal over Iran war. Reuters: 'Few signs actual withdrawal progressing.' Constitutional questions on unilateral exit remain unresolved. Germany still floated as potential NATO leader. Macron-Rutte private messages exposed by Trump. Alliance faces April renegotiation pressure.
key_facts: Iran war ending - NATO focus returns
Trump threatened withdrawal during Iran conflict
Reuters: 'Few signs actual withdrawal is happening'
Constitutional questions: Can Trump unilaterally exit?
US ambassador: Germany could take NATO military lead
Macron-Rutte private messages exposed on Truth Social
NATO $6.1B budget - ~16% US-funded
risks.trend: Tension persists - Iran distraction gone, alliance pressure returning

risks.event: China-Taiwan — Stable (April 8): ISW April 3-8 updates: No new escalation. US intelligence confirms China NOT planning 2027 invasion. ADIZ incursions below 200 (first time under Lai). Taiwan opposition: 'World does not need a crisis over Taiwan.' China pursuing peaceful unification conditions. Situation remains de-escalated.
key_facts: ISW April 3-8: No new escalation
US intel: NO 2027 invasion planned
ADIZ incursions below 200 - lowest under Lai
China pursuing peaceful unification conditions
Taiwan opposition: no crisis needed
Regional stability maintained

risks.event: Sudan Civil War — Spillover Risk (April 8): RSF shifting operations south toward South Sudan border. UNSC condemns attacks in Kordofan. 850+ families displaced. MSF warns of systematic violence against women. South Sudan at increasing risk of spillover. Humanitarian crisis deepening into Year 3.
key_facts: UNSC condemns RSF attacks in Kordofan
RSF operations shifting toward South Sudan border
850+ families displaced
MSF warns of systematic violence against women
Spillover risk to South Sudan increasing
Humanitarian crisis deepening - Year 3
